_comment2: PP29 Configuration - EDIT THESE PATHS FOR YOUR ENVIRONMENT
_comment3: Copy this file to config.json and update the paths below
_sap_input_path_help: Network drive where SAP auto-downloads the 13 daily .txt files
_access_excel_path_help: OPTIONAL: Path where MS Access currently saves daily .xls files. Used by consolidate mode to read historical data.
_daily_output_path_help: Where daily generated Excel files will be saved
_consolidated_output_path_help: Where consolidated/comparison Excel files will be saved
_db_path_help: SQLite database for historical data storage
_num_periods_help: Number of future periods to include in output (matching Access pivot)
_entities_help: The 13 entity codes that SAP exports daily. Used to find matching .txt files.
